---
title: "Ernest Garstin Anderson Morshead"
---

## Ernest Garstin Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (9 Oct 1851- 1912)

### Description

cousin of CMY, surgeon

### Biography

He qualified MRCS from UCL in 1875. He was fifth son of the Rev. John Philip Anderson Morshead and Alethea Yonge. [LG 1871; Winchester College Register]

### Letters

- Letter from September 11, 1869
- Letter from January 19, 1869
- Letter from Oct 13th [1851[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
